control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents requester self-approval. Pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) requires approval before PO issuance. This action complies with all.
expected_control_effect: System will route the purchase request to the department_head for approval before PO issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation rules.
overall_reason: Given the total amount of 1,750,000 and no quarter-end pressure, it is optimal to create a single purchase request with normal route_type that triggers department_head approval as required. This approach minimizes approval lead time while following all controls and allowed actions.
reason: The purchase need amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department_head approval, so a single purchase request with route_type normal is appropriate. There is no quarter-end pressure, so normal approval timing is acceptable. Creating one request meets objectives efficiently without unnecessary splitting.
